generated_oml:
instance CurrentSensorIM : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor attached to the permanent magnet synchronous motor (I_M)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPosEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder located on the motor shaft of the first rotary joint."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPosEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder located on the gearbox side of the first rotary joint."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorIM
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPosEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPosEncoder
]

instance TorqueSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorIM, MotorPosEncoder, GearboxPosEncoder
    base:desc "Torque signal derived from current and position measurements time‑stamped and transmitted to the DT."
]

instance AngularVelocitySignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPosEncoder, GearboxPosEncoder
    base:desc "Angular velocity signal derived from encoder data time‑stamped and transmitted to the DT."
]

instance SysMLStructuralModelFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering SysML structural model of the first rotary joint of the MABI MAX 0100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the permanent magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the dual‑gear gearbox dynamics driving the first joint."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink white‑box friction model for the joint, including Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre formulations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped current measurement from I_M sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, ProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor shaft position from MotorPosEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, ProcessingEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped gearbox side position from GearboxPosEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, ProcessingEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque signal based on current and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity signal based on encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocitySignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for SysML structural modeling facilitates model validation and traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetAdministrationShellIntegrationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Microsoft MATLAB Simulink simulation runs motor, gearbox, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables MultiPhysicsSimulationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling real‑time data streaming of sensor readings to the DT."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkingAggregationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell metadata enabler provides semantic description and traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetAdministrationShellIntegrationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard enabler providing visualisation of joint status and friction insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance ProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Central processing enabler orchestrating data aggregation, friction identification, and parameter adaptation."
    DTDFVocab:enables WhiteBoxFrictionIdentificationService,
                      BlackBoxFrictionIdentificationService,
                      ContinuousParameterAdaptationService
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time white‑box friction model identification service using analytical models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time black‑box friction model identification service using machine learning techniques."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi‑physics simulation of joint friction with MATLAB Simulink motor/gearbox models."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationModelRefinementInsight
]

instance DataLinkingAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates all sensor and simulation data for analysis and insight generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceSchedulingInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard showing real‑time joint state, friction estimates, and maintenance alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlOptimizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousParameterAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adapts friction parameters continuously based on live sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrates Asset Administration Shell metadata for digital twin traceability."
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetAdministrationShellInsight
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to Asset Administration Shell integration and metadata."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into static, kinetic, and viscous friction behaviour of the first joint."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of control algorithm parameters based on friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for maintenance scheduling derived from friction wear trends."
]

instance MotionControlOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight to optimize robot motion control using refined friction models."
]

instance SimulationModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight to refine simulation models for better fidelity."
]

instance CentralProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central digital processing component orchestrating data flow, model execution, and insight generation."
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Robot first axis environment containing sensors, models, and enablers."
    base:contains CurrentSensorIM, MotorPosEncoder, GearboxPosEncoder, CentralProcessingComponent,
                   SysMLStructuralModelFirstAxis, MotorSimulationModel, GearboxSimulationModel,
                   FrictionSimulationModel, MQTTEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler,
                   AssetAdministrationShellEnabler, DashboardEnabler, ProcessingEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time updates synchronized with the sensor sampling rate; data are processed and visualised immediately upon publication via MQTT (every sensor time step)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT is a digital shadow consisting of the asset (MABI MAX 100 first axis), its engineering SysML model, a processing component that ingests sensor data traces, simulation models that generate virtual traces, and an AAS that links all elements; all components are integrated and visualised via a dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated (runtime) stage—uses live operational data for continuous identification and refinement of friction models; does not cover design or manufacturing phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensured full traceability from sensor source through processing to data points; combined analytic and data‑driven models for cross‑validation; continuously identified and updated friction parameters to account for wear or load changes; simulation parameters derived from manufacturer data; validity assessed by comparing simulated and measured traces (r_M, r_G, r_out) and analysing residuals."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT as the lightweight publish/subscribe protocol used to transmit sensor data streams from the robot controller to the digital shadow application."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The modeling approach follows SysML for structural and functional design; Asset Administration Shell (AAS) is used for semantic asset representation."
]
